parsed.production_notes: The video likely uses an AI face swap or deepfake over a human actor. The woman's face has an uncanny, smoothed appearance, and the lip-sync is slightly off, while the body movements and hands making the roti appear completely natural and human-recorded.

characters.appearance: Mid-30s, medium build, fair complexion. Dark hair pulled back into a simple style. She has a round face with soft features and wears a small bindi.
characters.wardrobe: Maroon salwar kameez with gold patterns, paired with a green and orange dupatta. She wears a mangalsutra and bangles.
characters.demeanor: Earnest, relatable, and confident, speaking directly to the viewer while multitasking.

scenes.setting: A typical Indian kitchen with white tiled walls, a green upper wall, a gas stove, and stainless steel utensils on shelves. Bright, even lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A stands in a kitchen, facing the camera. She is actively making rotis, rolling dough on a wooden board and cooking it on a gas stove to her right. The kitchen features white tiled walls with small floral patterns and various stainless steel containers on shelves. The lighting is bright and even. She maintains eye contact with the camera while working with her hands.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a single, continuous medium-wide shot of Character A in a kitchen. She speaks directly to the camera while demonstrating the process of making rotis. Subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen throughout her monologue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: किस्मत में तो बस एक हाउसवाइफ बनना ही लिखा था, पर मैंने अपनी किस्मत बदल दी। [It was written in my destiny to just be a housewife, but I changed my destiny.]
Character A says: रात के 11:00 बजे बच्चों को सुला के, चूल्हा-चौका साफ करके, फाइनली मैं सीरियल देखने बैठती थी। [At 11:00 PM, after putting the kids to sleep and cleaning the kitchen, I would finally sit down to watch serials.]
Character A says: दिन भर घर का काम, सबकी जिम्मेदारी। [All day household chores, everyone's responsibility.]
Character A says: पर अपनी पहचान का सोच के टेंशन होती थी। [But thinking about my own identity would give me tension.]
Character A says: एक दिन सोचा, ऐसे कब तक चलेगा? [One day I thought, how long will this go on?]
Character A says: तब मेरी सहेली मेघा ने बोला, "रोज 15 मिनट इंग्लिश सीख, वरना जिंदगी भर बच्चे और ससुराल में सिमट के रह जाएगी।" [Then my friend Megha said, "Learn English for 15 minutes every day, otherwise you will be confined to kids and in-laws for the rest of your life."]
Character A says: सच बताऊं तो इंग्लिश से डर लगता था। [To tell you the truth, I was scared of English.]
Character A says: स्कूल में टॉप थी, पर 8 साल घर में बैठ के सब भूल गई। [I was a topper in school, but sitting at home for 8 years, I forgot everything.]
Character A says: पति की ऑफिस की पार्टी में सब बीवियां इंग्लिश में बात करतीं, मैं हां-हां करती रहती। [At my husband's office party, all the wives would talk in English, I would just keep saying yes-yes.]
Character A says: बेटी की पीटीएम में टीचर इंग्लिश में बोलती, मैं चुप खड़ी रहती। [At my daughter's PTM, the teacher would speak in English, I would stand quietly.]
Character A says: अपने ही घर में बच्चे को होमवर्क नहीं करवा पाती, क्योंकि इंग्लिश नहीं आती। [I couldn't even help my child with homework in my own house, because I didn't know English.]
Character A says: फिर मुझे इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप दिखी। [Then I saw the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: ऐप खुलते ही स्पोकन इंग्लिश का पूरा शो सामने। [As soon as the app opened, the whole spoken English show was in front of me.]
Character A says: छोटी-छोटी वीडियो, सीधी-सादी हिंदी और समझने लायक तरीका। [Short videos, simple Hindi, and an understandable method.]
Character A says: बस वही देखकर शुरुआत कर दी। [I just started by watching that.]
Character A says: और एक एआई कोच है, 24 घंटे। [And there is an AI coach, 24 hours.]
Character A says: रात को बच्चे सोने के बाद, मुझसे चैट करके प्रैक्टिस करती थी। [At night after the kids slept, I would practice by chatting with it.]
Character A says: गलत लिखती, सुधार देती। 100 बार सुधार दिया। [If I wrote wrong, it would correct it. It corrected me 100 times.]
Character A says: कभी नहीं बोली, "उम्र हो गई तुम्हारी", सास जैसी नहीं थी वो। [It never said, "You are too old", it wasn't like a mother-in-law.]
Character A says: पहली रात एक लाइन बोली, "आई एम पूजा, आई हैव अ डॉटर, एंड आई वांट टू रीस्टार्ट माय करियर।" [The first night I spoke one line, "I am Pooja, I have a daughter, and I want to restart my career."]
Character A says: सुबह आईना देखा, पहली बार खुद पे विश्वास हुआ। [In the morning I looked in the mirror, for the first time I believed in myself.]
Character A says: घर के काम के बीच भी अपनी इंग्लिश को सुधरते देखा। [Even amidst household chores, I saw my English improving.]
Character A says: अब मेरी आदत बन गई है, रात के 11:00 बजे होता है मेरा इंग्लिश टाइम। [Now it has become my habit, 11:00 PM is my English time.]
Character A says: 15 मिनट इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप, अगले दिन एक नई लाइन। [15 minutes English Seekho app, next day a new line.]
Character A says: 3 महीने बाद वर्क फ्रॉम होम जॉब मिल गई, 18000 महीना। [After 3 months I got a work from home job, 18000 a month.]
Character A says: घर भी संभालती हूं, अपना पैसा भी कमाती हूं। [I manage the house too, and earn my own money.]
Character A says: पर सबसे बड़ा फर्क, बेटी का होमवर्क अब मैं करवाती हूं। [But the biggest difference, I help my daughter with her homework now.]
Character A says: पीटीएम में खुद जाती हूं, इंग्लिश में टीचर से बात करती हूं। [I go to the PTM myself, talk to the teacher in English.]
Character A says: बेटी देखती है, मुस्कुराती है। [My daughter watches, smiles.]
Character A says: पति ने कल बोला, "तू कॉलेज वाली पूजा वापस आ गई।" [My husband said yesterday, "You are back to the college Pooja."]
Character A says: मैंने बोला, "नहीं, कॉलेज वाली से बेहतर, क्योंकि इस बार मैंने खुद को खुद बनाया है।" [I said, "No, better than the college one, because this time I have made myself."]
Character A says: अगर आप भी सिर्फ घरवाली बनके नहीं रहना चाहती हो, एक चीज याद रखना, सीखो से सीखोगी तो ही बढ़ोगी। [If you also don't want to remain just a housewife, remember one thing, you will grow only if you learn from Seekho.]
Character A says: इंस्टॉल नाउ पर क्लिक करो, इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो, ₹1 का ट्रायल। [Click on install now, download the English Seekho app, ₹1 trial.]
Character A says: पहले 15 मिनट करके देखो, पसंद आए तो आगे बढ़ो। [Try it for 15 minutes first, if you like it then proceed.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Kismat mein toh bas ek housewife banna hi likha tha (It was written in my destiny to just be a housewife)
Par maine apni kismat badal di (But I changed my destiny)
Raat ke 11 baje bachon ko sula ke (At 11 PM after putting the kids to sleep)
Chulha chauka saaf karke (Cleaning the kitchen)
Finally main serial dekhne baithti thi (Finally I would sit to watch serials)
Din bhar ghar ka kaam (All day household chores)
Sabki zimmedari (Everyone's responsibility)
Par apni pehchaan ka soch ke tension hoti thi (But thinking about my identity gave me tension)
Ek din socha (One day I thought)
Aise kab tak chalega? (How long will this go on?)
Tab meri saheli Megha ne bola (Then my friend Megha said)
Roz 15 minute English seekh (Learn English for 15 minutes daily)
Varna zindagi bhar bachche aur sasural mein simat ke reh jayegi (Otherwise you'll be confined to kids and in-laws for life)
Sach bataun toh English se darr lagta tha (Honestly, I was scared of English)
School mein top thi (I was a topper in school)
Par 8 saal ghar mein baith ke sab bhool gayi (But sitting at home for 8 years, I forgot everything)
Pati ki office ki party mein sab biwiyan English mein baat karti (At husband's office party, all wives spoke in English)
Main haan haan karti rehti (I just kept saying yes yes)
Beti ki PTM mein teacher English mein bolti (At daughter's PTM, teacher spoke in English)
Main chup khadi rehti (I stood quietly)
Apne hi ghar mein bachche ko homework nahi karwa paati (Couldn't help my child with homework in my own house)
Kyunki English nahi aati (Because I didn't know English)
Phir mujhe English Seekho app dikhi (Then I saw the English Seekho app)
App khulte hi Spoken English ka poora show saamne (As soon as the app opened, the whole Spoken English show was there)
Chhoti chhoti video (Short videos)
Seedhi saadi Hindi aur samajhne layak tareeka (Simple Hindi and understandable method)
Bas wahi dekhkar shuruwat kar di (Just started by watching that)
Aur ek AI coach hai (And there is an AI coach)
24 ghante (24 hours)
Raat ko bachche sone ke baad (At night after kids slept)
Mujhse chat karke practice karti thi (I practiced by chatting with it)
Galat likhti, sudhaar deti (If I wrote wrong, it corrected)
100 baar sudhaar diya (Corrected 100 times)
Kabhi nahi boli (Never said)
Umar ho gayi tumhari (You are too old)
Saas jaisi nahi thi wo (It wasn't like a mother-in-law)
Pehli raat ek line boli (First night I spoke one line)
I am Pooja, I have a daughter, and I want to restart my career
Subah aaina dekha (Looked in the mirror in the morning)
Pehli baar khud pe vishwas hua (Believed in myself for the first time)
Ghar ke kaam ke beech bhi apni English ko sudharte dekha (Saw my English improving amidst household chores)
Ab meri aadat ban gayi hai (Now it's my habit)
Raat ke 11 baje hota hai mera English time (11 PM is my English time)
15 minute English Seekho app (15 minutes English Seekho app)
Agle din ek nayi line (Next day a new line)
3 mahine baad work from home job mil gayi (Got a work from home job after 3 months)
18000 mahina (18000 a month)
Ghar bhi sambhalti hoon (I manage the house too)
Apna paisa bhi kamati hoon (Earn my own money too)
Par sabse bada farq (But the biggest difference)
Beti ka homework ab main karwati hoon (I help my daughter with homework now)
PTM mein khud jaati hoon (I go to PTM myself)
English mein teacher se baat karti hoon (Talk to teacher in English)
Beti dekhti hai, muskurati hai (Daughter watches, smiles)
Pati ne kal bola (Husband said yesterday)
Tu college wali Pooja wapas aa gayi (You are back to college Pooja)
Maine bola (I said)
Nahi, college wali se behtar (No, better than the college one)
Kyunki is baar maine khud ko khud banaya hai (Because this time I made myself)
Agar aap bhi sirf gharwali banke nahi rehna chahti ho (If you also don't want to just be a housewife)
Ek cheez yaad rakhna (Remember one thing)
Seekho se seekhogi toh hi badhogi (You'll grow only if you learn from Seekho)
Install now par click karo (Click on install now)
English Seekho app download karo (Download English Seekho app)
1 rupaye ka trial (1 rupee trial)
Pehle 15 minute karke dekho (Try for 15 minutes first)
Pasand aaye toh aage badho (If you like it, proceed)

scenes.setting: Digital graphic with a solid light purple background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed vertically in the center against a solid light purple background. The screen of the smartphone is blank.

scenes.visual_description: An end card graphic featuring a smartphone mockup on a light purple background. The phone screen displays the 'English Seekho' app logo. Below the phone, a purple 'INSTALL NOW' button is visible.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.setting: Digital graphic with a solid black background.
scenes.visual_description: A black screen displaying a lengthy disclaimer text in white font.
scenes.on_screen_text: English Seekho kisi bhi government authority institution brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
